info.name: Agnost Insight Engine
info.description: Sentiment analytics for conversational AI agents. Import this collection and run all endpoints.

request.description: POST /ingest — validate, embed, and store a conversation
GET /insights — all 27 PM insights sorted by volume. Served from DB, zero LLM calls.
GET /insights/{id} — drill into one cluster: full insight, action, sample quote
POST /analyze — triggers background clustering job. Returns 202 + job_id immediately (<1s). CPU work runs in ProcessPoolExecutor.
GET /analyze/{job_id} — poll job status: pending → running → complete/failed
